Title: IRONLANCE | Brushed Black Tungsten 8 Laser-Engraved Cross Wedding Ring - 8mm
Description: The IRONLANCE is a handcrafted men's tungsten carbide wedding band - 8mm wide, with a brushed matte black center face flanked by polished black stepped edges, marked by eight evenly-spaced laser-engraved crosses cut into the metal itself. Comfort fit. Free inside engraving. Backed for life. Built for the man who wants his faith on the ring he wears every day, without ever raising his voice. The Metal Tungsten carbide is the hardest wedding-band metal made - Mohs hardness 8.5 to 9, roughly 4× harder than titanium and 10× harder than 18k gold. That's not marketing copy; it's measurable. In daily terms: keys, tools, gym weights, steering wheels, and contact with desks or phone cases will not scratch the IRONLANCE. The band you open today will look the same five and ten years from now. The matte black tone is a PVD (physical vapor deposition) finish bonded to the tungsten core at the molecular level - not paint, not plating. It will not chip, peel, or wear through. The metal itself is fully hypoallergenic and nickel-free, safe even for sensitive skin. The brushed surface carries a fine, even grain across the entire face - quiet, uniform, and intentional. The Eight Crosses Each cross on the IRONLANCE is laser-etched directly into the tungsten - not printed, not stamped, not applied as a decal. A high-precision laser ablates a thin layer of the black PVD coating at each cross location, revealing the silver tungsten beneath as a clean, recessed cross shape. Eight of them spaced evenly around the full circumference of the band. From three feet away, the IRONLANCE reads as a brushed black band with a quiet rhythm of detail. Up close, every cross is crisp, deliberate, and identical to the last. Because the engraving is cut into the tungsten itself, no daily wear will fade them. No polish, no recoating, no maintenance - they are part of the metal now. Who It's For The IRONLANCE is for the man whose faith is part of the foundation of his life and wants his wedding band to carry that quietly. It's not loud. It doesn't sit on the outside of a separate pendant. The symbol is built into the band, where his wedding ring already sits - a daily-wear marker of the two things he doesn't take off. Key Features Tungsten carbide construction - Mohs 8.5-9 hardness, approximately 4× harder than titanium and 10× harder than 18k gold; will not scratch, bend, or deform under daily wear Brushed matte black PVD finish - bonded to the tungsten core at the molecular level; will not peel, chip, or wear through Eight evenly-spaced laser-engraved crosses - cut directly into the tungsten, permanent, identical, running the full circumference of the band 8mm width, brushed flat center, polished stepped edges - substantial, masculine presence on the finger with a refined two-finish silhouette Comfort-fit interior - gently rounded inside curve, designed for all-day wear with no edge bite Hypoallergenic and nickel-free - safe for sensitive skin, no green-finger reaction Free inside laser engraving - up to 30 characters in the font of your choice, included with every order Lifetime warranty + lifetime sizing program - defect coverage for life; if your finger size changes, we replace the ring in your new size Ring sizes 7 through 15, including half sizes - 15 sizes total, Closing A wedding ring should outlast the marriage it represents, and it should mean something every time you look at it. The IRONLANCE does both - brushed black tungsten carbide, eight laser-engraved crosses cut into the metal, comfort-fit inside, free personal engraving, and a lifetime of service standing behind it. Choose your size, add your inside engraving, and we'll handcraft your IRONLANCE and ship it insured within 1-2 weeks. Engrave the inside. Make it his.

Title: PHANTOM | Black Titanium Fidget Spinner Wedding Ring - 8mm
Description: The PHANTOM is a handcrafted black titanium men's wedding band, 8mm wide, with a brushed-finish outer shell that spins freely around a polished titanium base - a real mechanical fidget mechanism built into an ultra-lightweight titanium frame. Built comfort-fit, inside-laser-engravable, and backed by our lifetime warranty. The titanium sibling of our REVOLVE - same mechanism, roughly 60% lighter on the finger. The Metal Titanium is the lightest of the hard-wear wedding-band metals - about 45% lighter than stainless steel and roughly 60% lighter than tungsten. That weight difference matters a lot in a spinner ring: the lighter the outer shell, the less rotational inertia, and the easier and faster it spins from a single flick. The PHANTOM will spin longer and freer than its tungsten sibling from the same effort. It's the same aerospace-grade metal used in aircraft structural parts and surgical implants: Mohs hardness ~6, fully hypoallergenic, nickel-free, and immune to rust, tarnish, and corrosion from saltwater, sweat, or chlorine. The black tone is a physical-vapor-deposited (PVD) finish bonded at the molecular level - the same process used on high-end watch cases - and won't peel, strip, or wear through. The Spinner Mechanism The outer brushed shell of the PHANTOM rotates around the inner titanium base on a precision bearing built into the ring. You can spin it with a flick of your thumb or index finger, one-handed, silently, and continuously. The bearing is machined to keep the shell centered and low-friction - in the PHANTOM specifically, because titanium is lighter than tungsten, a single flick gives noticeably more rotations before the shell slows to a stop. This isn't decorative. Spinner rings are used by people with anxiety, ADHD, restless-hand habits, and high-stress jobs as a grounding tool - the repetitive spinning motion redirects nervous energy into a quiet, hand-only action. It's the ring equivalent of worry beads or a stress ball, except it's always on your finger, it's silent, and it looks like a wedding band to everyone else. PHANTOM vs. REVOLVE Same mechanism, different metal. Choose the PHANTOM if you want the lightest possible feel on your finger (titanium), longer free-spin time from each flick, and don't mind that titanium is softer than tungsten - micro-scratches can develop over years of heavy wear. Choose the REVOLVE if you want maximum scratch-resistance for life (tungsten), prefer a little more heft, and expect the ring to look identical in 20 years. Price and mechanism are essentially the same; it's a feel-and-durability trade-off. Who It's For The PHANTOM is for the man who fidgets and wants the lightest, freest-spinning option. It's also for anyone with a sensitivity to heavier rings, for whom an 8mm tungsten band is too much weight - titanium at 8mm feels closer to a thin silver band on the finger. Common buyers: ADHD, anxiety, desk-job high-stress, former nicotine/gum replacement, and anyone whose job has them on their feet all day and who doesn't want to feel the ring's weight. Key Features Aerospace-grade titanium construction - 60% lighter than tungsten, hypoallergenic, nickel-free, corrosion-proof Precision-bearing spinner mechanism - outer shell rotates freely, longer free-spin than tungsten due to lower weight Black PVD finish - molecularly bonded to the titanium core, will not peel or strip Two-texture design - brushed outer shell, polished inner base 8mm width with polished beveled edges Comfort-fit interior - rounded inside for all-day wear Free inside laser engraving - up to 30 characters, any font Lifetime warranty + replacement sizing program - defect coverage and a replacement ring if your finger size changes (see warranty page) Ring sizes 7 - 15 (including half sizes) Care Instructions The PHANTOM is nearly maintenance-free. Clean with warm water, a drop of mild dish soap, and a soft toothbrush - bristles reach into the gap between the spinner shell and the base to clear lint or fiber. Dry thoroughly, spinning the shell under running water to flush the bearing. The spinner mechanism is designed to run dry; do not lubricate. Avoid immersing in sand, dirt, or grit, which can work into the bearing and cause drag. Titanium is hardy to chemicals, so soap, shampoo, sweat, and sunscreen won't affect it. Closing / CTA A wedding band should work with you, not against you. The PHANTOM gives you the lightest possible spinner ring we make - a grounding tool in a form nobody but you will recognize. Select your size above, add your engraving, and we'll handcraft your PHANTOM and ship it insured within 1-2 weeks. Engrave the inside. Make it his. Frequently Asked Questions Q: Does the spinner on the PHANTOM actually spin freely? A: Yes - and in fact, it spins longer than the tungsten REVOLVE from the same flick because titanium is about 60% lighter. The outer brushed shell rotates on a precision bearing around the polished titanium inner base. Silent, one-handed, and continuous.
